arguments.description: inplace If "True" replaces the existing key. The default is "True". replace_dict
arguments.name: The context to change (i.e., ${Context.Key}).

arguments.description: capitalize If "True" capitalizes the first letter of the context key. output_key
arguments.name: A list of key-values to replace key for value in the following format: {"old_key1":"new_key1", "old_key2":"new_key2"}
The context path in which to output the results. Should be in the format of Context.Key.
